author: claude
content: fix/profile-coverage-deterministic-dns #1183: clean (no conflicts); rebased -b 2 commits onto master 315e6672. Test-only (test_crawl.py). jj-precommit green; pytest collection clean (test_browser_profile_coverage). Did NOT run the browser test at runtime: it is a full-crawl browser test, env-blocked by the same FF150-vs-extension152 addon-install rejection seen on #1180/#1184; non-browser verification fully green. new tip b47faa4a; MERGEABLE. NOTE for Stefan: the bookmark had a stale DIVERGENT orphan commit (26d97393, no bookmark, older base) alongside the canonical origin head; I left it untouched per no-abandon rule -- harmless but you may want to clean it up locally.
